result:
Done. All three missing operations are implemented in `CsvRow.calr` (the project's Calor source), the project builds cleanly, and every behavior in the spec was verified at runtime — 26/26 checks pass, including the round-trip property.

What was added to `src/CsvRow.calr` (alongside the existing `NeedsQuoting`, which is unchanged):

- **`EscapeField`** — returns the field verbatim unless `NeedsQuoting` holds, in which case it doubles internal quotes via `(replace field "\"" "\"\"")` and wraps the result in quotes.
- **`JoinRow`** — builds the line with a StringBuilder, escaping each field and inserting commas between fields (a `first` flag skips the leading comma); the empty list yields the empty string.
- **`SplitRow`** — a field-at-a-time loop: a field starting with `"` is consumed to its un-doubled closing quote (doubled quotes contribute one literal quote; commas/CR/LF inside are content), otherwise the field runs to the next comma or end of line; after each field, a remaining comma is consumed and the loop continues, so a trailing comma correctly produces a final empty field and the empty line parses to one empty field.

Two Calor-specific wrinkles came up during the build cycles (3 of the 10 budget used): an empty `§LIST` literal needs an explicit `§/LIST{fields}` closer, and `§PUSH` requires declaring the `mut` effect on `SplitRow` — that's local-collection mutation only, so the function is still pure computation per the spec's constraints. I also deliberately avoided `char-at`, since Calor char literals lex as string tokens and would have emitted invalid `char == string` comparisons; single-character `substr` slices are compared as strings instead.

Verification: I compiled a throwaway console app in a temp directory (outside the project, since test files weren't allowed) referencing the built `Src.dll`, and exercised all the spec cases — quoting/escaping edge cases, empty list vs. single-empty-field asymmetry, trailing commas, embedded quotes/commas/CRLF, and `SplitRow(JoinRow(fields)) == fields` across nine assorted field lists. Everything passed, and the scratch directory has been removed.
